Slower ball, Woakes didn't slog this as well as he would have liked but still seemed to have gotten a fair piece of it. Nortje near the ropes did well to first judge the catch and then ensure that his feet didn't touch the ropes. From a possible six to a dot, gamechanging.

full_text: Shamsi to Bairstow, Lbw!! Bairstow has been adjudged lbw and he is quick to review it. It's the leg-break and Bairstow misses the flick while looking to play it off the back foot. No bat, confirms UltraEdge. and the on-field call stays. England lose Bairstow and a review. He was a touch late into his shot and got beaten by the in-spin. South Africa fighting hard to stay alive in the competition.

full_text: Nortje to Buttler, Caught by Bavuma!! South Africa badly needed this wicket! Nortje is pumped. He tricked the in-form batter with an off-pace ball. 133kph, fuller than good length around off, Buttler moves leg-side and is a touch early into his shot. Doesn't get the elevation as he swings hard and it comes off the lower part of the bat. Captain Bavuma takes a safe, low catch at mid-off and South Africa have an opening.

full_text: Nortje to Buttler, , wow! That's a stunning hit. That was bowled at and Buttler hit it with absolute disdain. Fuller than good length, Buttler casually moves leg-side, exposes all his sticks and clobbers it over deep mid-wicket with a good swing of the bat

full_text: Nortje to Roy, no run, big appeal for lbw, struck down. Bavuma has a chat with his team-mates and sends it upstairs. That was in-nipper at , and a hopping Roy missed the tuck. Another right call from Joel Wilson
